Container.Name: Sidereal
Container.Changes:
### v0.9.0 - CHANGE: SQLite is now the default database — no external PostgreSQL required - CHANGE: PostgreSQL is optional (set DATABASE_URL to use it) - CHANGE: Database stored in /app/config directory (persisted via Config Directory volume) - FIX: Tag filtering now works on both SQLite and PostgreSQL
### v0.7.1 - FIX: Automatic permission handling for /app/cache - CONFIG: Added /app/cache volume mapping to standard template
### v0.7.0 - FEAT: Deep Sky Catalog & Targets page - FEAT: Automated survey thumbnails with DSS2 data - FEAT: "Best Now" intelligent target sorting - FEAT: Immich Metadata Sync writeback - CONFIG: Added /app/cache path mapping requirement. **Existing users: Please manually add a new path mapping for /app/cache to ensure survey images are persisted.**
### v0.4.1 - FEAT: Visual Image Renaming (custom display titles) - FEAT: PUID/PGID support for proper volume permissions - FIX: Standardized coordinate formats for accurate marker placement - FIX: Resolved EACCES errors in date-organized sidecar directories
### v0.4.0 - FEAT: Interactive Sky Map with Aladin Lite v3 integration - FEAT: Plate-solved images automatically plotted on full-sky atlas - FEAT: Deep-linking support (?image=ID) for direct navigation from map to gallery - FEAT: Real-time constellation identification from coordinates - IMPROVE: Refined loading states and WebGL2 support detection - FIX: Standardized coordinate formats for accurate marker placement
### v0.3.0 - FEAT: Configurable plate solving behavior with admin interface controls - FEAT: Worker check interval configuration (10-300 seconds) - FEAT: Active polling interval configuration (1-60 seconds) - FEAT: Configurable max concurrent jobs (1-10) - FEAT: Auto-resubmit failed jobs toggle (default: disabled) - IMPROVE: Continuous polling until Astrometry.net explicitly marks jobs as failed or successful (no timeout) - SECURITY: Comprehensive security fixes and secret management - FEAT: Complete Docker containerization with multi-stage builds - FEAT: PostgreSQL support for production environments - FEAT: Worker process management with enable/disable functionality - FIX: Thumbnail proxy endpoint 500 errors resolved - REFACTOR: Project renamed from Sidereal to Sidereal - DOCS: Enhanced security documentation and deployment guides
### v0.2.0 - SECURITY: Comprehensive security fixes and secret management - FEAT: Complete Docker containerization with multi-stage builds - FEAT: PostgreSQL support for production environments - FEAT: Worker process management with enable/disable functionality - FIX: Thumbnail proxy endpoint 500 errors resolved - REFACTOR: Project renamed from Sidereal to Sidereal - DOCS: Enhanced security documentation and deployment guides
### v0.1.0 - Initial release - Astrophotography image management - Plate solving integration - Equipment tracking - Immich synchronization
Container.Overview: Sidereal is a comprehensive astrophotography image management and analysis application that bridges the gap between your astrophotography sessions and organized digital asset management. It provides seamless integration with Immich for photo management, advanced plate solving through Astrometry.net, and detailed equipment tracking to help you organize and analyze your celestial captures.
Container.Description:
Sidereal is a comprehensive astrophotography image management and analysis application. It provides automatic synchronization with Immich, plate solving capabilities through Astrometry.net, equipment tracking, and detailed image metadata management. Perfect for organizing and analyzing your astrophotography collection.
Features: - Interactive Sky Map (Aladin Lite v3) - Automatic Immich synchronization - Configurable plate solving with Astrometry.net - Equipment and settings tracking - Image tagging and filtering - Real-time progress updates - Dark theme optimized for astronomy - Secure configuration management - Advanced plate solving configuration options
Requirements: - No external database needed (built-in SQLite database, stored in /app/config) - Optional: PostgreSQL for advanced deployments (set DATABASE_URL) - Optional: Immich server for photo management - Optional: Astrometry.net API key for plate solving
Security Notes: - API keys are stored securely as environment variables - No secrets are embedded in the container image - Configuration can also be managed via the admin web interface - Always use strong, unique passwords for database connections
Plate Solving Configuration: - Worker check interval: How often the worker checks for new jobs (10-300 seconds) [WORKER ONLY] - Active polling interval: How often to poll when waiting for completion (1-60 seconds) [WORKER ONLY] - Max concurrent jobs: Maximum simultaneous jobs (1-10) [WORKER ONLY] - Auto-resubmit: Whether to automatically retry failed jobs (default: disabled) [WORKER ONLY]
Worker Mode: - The plate solving worker runs as a background process within the container - Worker-only settings only affect the background plate solving process - These settings can also be configured through the admin web interface

Config.Name: Cache Directory
Config.Description: Cache storage for thumbnails and survey images

Config.Name: Database URL
Config.Description: Leave empty to use built-in SQLite database. Set to a PostgreSQL connection string for external database support (e.g., postgresql://sidereal:password@postgres:5432/sidereal)

Config.Name: Immich API Key
Config.Description: Immich API key for integration (can also be configured via admin interface)

Config.Name: Astrometry API Key
Config.Description: Astrometry.net API key for plate solving (can also be configured via admin interface)

Config.Name: Enable Plate Solving
Config.Description: Enable background plate solving worker [WORKER ONLY]

Config.Name: Worker Check Interval (seconds)
Config.Description: How often the worker checks for new jobs and updates existing ones (10-300 seconds) [WORKER ONLY]

Config.Name: Active Polling Interval (seconds)
Config.Description: How often to poll when actively waiting for job completion (1-60 seconds) [WORKER ONLY]

Config.Name: Max Concurrent Jobs
Config.Description: Maximum number of plate solving jobs to run simultaneously (1-10) [WORKER ONLY]

Config.Name: Auto-resubmit Failed Jobs
Config.Description: When enabled, failed jobs will be automatically retried. When disabled, failed jobs must be manually resubmitted [WORKER ONLY]

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: User ID for file permissions (99 is nobody on Unraid)

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: Group ID for file permissions (100 is users on Unraid)
